case_title: PATEL, N.R. vs. EDDINGS, LOUIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. AS TO DEFENDANT EDDINGS, LOUIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT EDDINGS, LOUIS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR J. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ATTY. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - REST. OF PREMISES AT 74 6TH ST, #409 - WRIT ISSUES IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 8-10-93, 5PM - WAIVE ALL RENT & U.D. DAM- AGES - IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE, JUDGMENT INCLUDES $260 RENT, $8.67 PER DIEM FROM 7-2-93, & $80 COSTS - MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS - PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED - DEF. STIPS. THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY. FEES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDDINGS, LOUIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 6TH ST, #409, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL AUG-10-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE JUDGMENT WILL INCLUDE $260 RENT,$8.67 PER DIEM FR 7-2-93. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. SEE FILE FOR DETAILS OF JUDGMENT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT EDDINGS, LOUIS
